records.headline: Enron reports recurring earnings growth in 1997 and sets up 1998 growth platform
records.summary: Archived year-end earnings release describing 1997 results and the company's 1998 growth posture.

records.headline: Enron reports second quarter 1998 earnings of $0.42 per share
records.summary: Archived second-quarter 1998 earnings release describing continued wholesale growth and contract execution.

records.headline: Enron reports third quarter 1998 earnings and raises the annual dividend
records.summary: Archived third-quarter 1998 earnings release covering wholesale growth, retail expansion, and dividend increase.

records.headline: Enron reports increased earnings results for the first quarter of 1999
records.summary: Archived first-quarter 1999 earnings release describing wholesale strength, retail contracting, and growing credit-market exposure.

records.headline: Enron files its Form 10-K for fiscal year 1999
records.summary: Annual report and Form 10-K filing covering the fiscal year ended December 31, 1999.

records.headline: PG&E files for Chapter 11 protection
records.summary: SEC filing record documenting PG&E's April 6, 2001 bankruptcy filing.

records.headline: Jeffrey Skilling resigns as chief executive officer
records.summary: Public resignation record that marks the executive transition during Enron's disclosure spiral.

records.headline: FERC refund hearing record enters the California crisis timeline
records.summary: Public hearing record covering the California refund dispute and Enron-era power-market conduct.

records.headline: Enron files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection
records.summary: Public bankruptcy filing that anchors the collapse phase of the Enron timeline.

records.headline: Congress releases the Watkins memo and related oversight material
records.summary: Public release of the Watkins memo and related committee material during the collapse investigation.

records.headline: Arthur Andersen is indicted over Enron-related document destruction
records.summary: Public indictment record tied to the document-retention and destruction story around Enron.
